overall.description: A first-person walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city street at night, featuring neon-lit storefronts, massive futuristic architecture in the background, and heavy rainfall creating reflective puddles. The footage is from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), showing the player character walking through a dystopian urban environment with industrial debris and scattered trash.

events.description: slight rightward adjustment to navigate around debris on sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk past green industrial dumpsters and piled trash bags in the rain

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement screen mounted on building showing colorful graphics
towering cylindrical mega-structure with scaffolding and bright lights dominating the skyline
large industrial waste containers with yellow safety stripes
piles of blue and black garbage bags stacked along the sidewalk edge
tall wooden power poles with multiple cross-arms and hanging wires

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a heavy rainstorm in a dystopian city street. The camera moves forward past industrial green dumpsters and trash bags lining the left side, while a massive futuristic stadium looms in the distant center. A digital billboard glows on the left building, and utility poles with overhead wires frame the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: street with glowing purple neon food stall

events.description: purple neon light from food stall becomes visible ahead on the right
passing the illuminated food stall with outdoor seating

agents.ego_description: continuing forward past the green dumpsters and approaching a brightly lit purple neon stall

entered.detail: small vendor stall with bright magenta-purple vertical neon lighting and corrugated metal roof
plastic tables and chairs arranged on the wet pavement

segments.scene_description: As the camera advances, the green dumpsters fall behind and a vibrant purple neon food stall emerges on the right, casting colorful reflections on the wet ground. The massive stadium structure grows larger in the center view. The camera passes the stall and its outdoor seating area, continuing through the rain-soaked street.

scene_state.functional_zone: open approach to mega-structure with scattered pedestrians

events.description: pedestrian appears walking in opposite direction through the rain

agents.ego_description: walking toward the massive stadium structure as pedestrians pass by in the rain

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in tank top and shorts walking opposite direction through the rain

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the left side of the street
wet cardboard pieces and debris floating in puddles on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: In the final stretch, the camera moves past the neon stall and encounters pedestrians walking through the downpour. Palm trees line the left side while the massive futuristic stadium dominates the center view, appearing closer and more detailed. Scattered cardboard debris floats in the puddles as the rain continues to fall heavily.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a rain-drenched dystopian street that transitions from a gritty industrial alley into a vibrant, neon-lit urban corridor. It begins by passing green dumpsters and trash bags under a network of overhead wires, with a massive futuristic stadium looming in the distant center. As the camera advances, the industrial debris falls away to reveal a purple neon food stall on the right, which casts colorful reflections across the wet pavement. The scene then expands past the stall's outdoor seating area and toward pedestrians braving the downpour, while palm trees emerge along the left side. Finally, the camera pushes further into the storm, where floating cardboard debris fills the puddles and the towering stadium dominates the view in sharp detail.
